overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt exploring a sunlit fantasy city with white stone architecture and red rooftops. The character ascends a terrace overlooking a lake, then descends through courtyards and covered passages.

scene_state.functional_zone: ornate terrace gazebo with panoramic view

events.description: reaching top of stairs and entering the gazebo terrace
turning around at terrace edge to face back toward the city

agents.ego_description: ascending stone stairs to a terrace gazebo, walking around to view the landscape, then turning back

notable_agents.action: woman in dark dress standing at the terrace railing looking at the view

entered.detail: elaborate white stone pavilion with carved columns and vaulted roof
tall decorative columns supporting the gazebo roof
stone statues of winged figures flanking the terrace
large pots with pink flowers on the terrace wall
distant blue mountain range visible beyond the terrace
bright blue body of water below the terrace
tall pointed towers of the city architecture

segments.scene_description: The character ascends a grand staircase toward an ornate gazebo with marble pillars and angel statues. Reaching the terrace, the camera reveals a panoramic view of distant mountains and a turquoise lake. The character walks around the gazebo interior, passing terracotta flower pots, then turns back toward the city.

agents.ego_description: descending through a sunlit cobblestone courtyard between cream-colored buildings with red roofs

notable_agents.action: two villagers walking ahead on the cobblestone path

entered.detail: open paved area with irregular stone tiles
whitewashed medieval structures with ornate facades
distinctive crimson roofing on the buildings
gothic-style pointed arch windows with tracery
decorative archway connecting buildings in the distance
manicured green shrubs lining the courtyard

segments.scene_description: Leaving the terrace, the character enters a sunlit cobblestone courtyard surrounded by cream stone buildings with distinctive red roofs. Other villagers walk through the plaza, and ornate spires rise in the background. The camera follows the cobblestone path past manicured bushes toward a stone archway.

events.description: entering dark covered stairway from bright courtyard

agents.ego_description: climbing a covered stone staircase through a dimly lit archway

entered.detail: enclosed stone staircase with high walls
gothic arch marking the passage entrance
decorative metal light fixtures on the walls
potted rose bushes placed along the stairway
dark wooden door at the top of the stairs

segments.scene_description: The character enters a narrow, covered stone stairway where the lighting shifts dramatically to low light. Iron wall lanterns and potted red roses line the walls. The enclosed space features ornate stone arches overhead as the character ascends the steps toward a wooden doorway.

events.description: emerging from dark interior to partially lit narrow path

agents.ego_description: walking through a shadowed narrow passage lined with ivy and red flowering vines

entered.detail: constricted walkway between high stone walls
stone walls completely covered in green ivy
vibrant red flowers growing up the wall surfaces
sculpture of a robed figure set in a niche
natural stone face forming the passage boundary
stone arch leading to the next area

segments.scene_description: Exiting the dark stairwell, the character enters a narrow outdoor passage shaded by high stone walls covered in dense ivy and red climbing roses. A stone angel statue stands against the rock wall. The path winds through the greenery toward a small archway leading back to open sky.

events.description: passing through large monumental archway into open plaza

agents.ego_description: climbing a wide stone staircase toward a monumental archway with spires visible beyond

notable_agents.action: woman in green dress ascending the stairs ahead

entered.detail: wide stone steps leading upward through the city
large decorative stone archway spanning the path
pointed towers rising above the archway
ornate railing along the staircase edge
mature tree with silvery green leaves

segments.scene_description: The character emerges into bright sunlight at the base of a grand staircase leading through a monumental stone archway. Tall spires rise in the distance against the turquoise sky. The character ascends the steps, passing an olive tree and stone balustrades, following a woman in a green dress toward the upper city.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous journey from a panoramic mountain terrace through the contrasting light of narrow city passages and back into a bright, monumental plaza. It begins with an ascent up a grand staircase toward an ornate marble gazebo, where the camera reveals a turquoise lake and distant mountains before turning back toward the city. As the character leaves the terrace, the scene opens into a sunlit cobblestone courtyard filled with red-roofed buildings and villagers, moving past manicured bushes toward a stone archway. The environment then shifts dramatically into a dim, covered stairway lined with iron lanterns and red roses, which leads into a shaded outdoor passage draped in dense ivy and climbing roses. Finally, the camera emerges from the greenery back into brilliant sunlight at the base of a monumental archway, ascending a final set of steps past an olive tree toward the towering spires of the upper city.
